components.name: Accordion
components.useWhen: presenting a vertical list of related collapsible sections (use Collapsible for a single standalone toggle region)

components.name: Alert
components.useWhen: surfacing a page or section-level message in a semantic tone (info, success, warning, destructive); use the future Banner for app-spanning system messages

components.name: AlertDialog
components.useWhen: confirming a destructive or irreversible action where accidental dismissal must be impossible (use Dialog for non-destructive focused tasks)

components.name: AspectRatio
components.useWhen: reserving a fixed width:height box for image, video, or media content to prevent layout shift on load

components.name: Avatar
components.useWhen: rendering a single user or organization avatar with image + initials fallback (the fallback shows automatically on image load failure)

components.name: Badge
components.useWhen: rendering a compact status, label, or filter chip with optional leading or trailing icon and optional dismiss button

components.name: BadgeWithOverflow
components.useWhen: rendering a single status badge that may be paired with a "+N" overflow indicator

components.name: BottomDock
components.useWhen: anchoring sticky utility links (support, settings, theme toggle, user row) to the bottom of the sidebar

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.useWhen: rendering a hierarchical location trail on a detail page where the parent context matters (skip on flat list or single-level pages)

components.name: Button
components.useWhen: rendering an interactive trigger that may need a loading state, leading or trailing icon, or asChild composition into a link

components.name: Calendar
components.useWhen: rendering an inline month grid for date or date-range selection (use DateRangePicker pattern for the popover-anchored variant)

components.name: Card
components.useWhen: wrapping a distinct, actionable region with its own surface and shadow (don't reach for Card as a default container — use spacing first)

components.name: ChartContainer
components.useWhen: rendering a recharts chart whose series colors must swap correctly in dark mode (always pair with ChartConfig keyed by series name)

components.name: Checkbox
components.useWhen: rendering a single boolean choice that commits on form submit (use Switch for immediate-effect toggles)

components.name: Collapsible
components.useWhen: toggling a single show/hide region with no sibling sections (use Accordion for related multiple collapsibles)

components.name: Command
components.useWhen: building a searchable command palette or large typeahead-filtered picker (use Select for short fixed-option lists)

components.name: ContextMenu
components.useWhen: attaching a right-click contextual menu to a region (always pair with a DropdownMenu equivalent for touch users)

components.name: Currency
components.useWhen: displaying a TRY monetary value anywhere in the product (always pass Decimal when available, never compute money in floats)

components.name: DataTable
components.useWhen: rendering a sortable, filterable, optionally selectable or expandable data table (pair with DataTableToolbar for the standard top row)

components.name: DataTableToolbar
components.useWhen: mounting the standard toolbar above a DataTable for search, faceted filters, column visibility, and import/export

components.name: DateRangePicker
components.useWhen: presenting a popover-anchored date-range input on screens that scope data to a period (use raw Calendar for inline grids, future DateInput for single-date selection)

components.name: Dialog
components.useWhen: interrupting flow with a focused task or confirmation that requires the page to stop (use AlertDialog for destructive confirmations, Sheet to preserve context)

components.name: Drawer
components.useWhen: presenting a touch-first bottom-anchored panel with swipe-to-dismiss (use Sheet for desktop-first slide-overs, Dialog for focused tasks)

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.useWhen: rendering an anchored menu opened from a button (use ContextMenu for right-click, Menubar for desktop top bar, Command for searchable)

components.name: EmptyState
components.useWhen: filling a region that has genuinely no data with an icon, title, description, and a next-step action (always offer an action; empty without a next step is a dead end)

components.name: Form
components.useWhen: building any react-hook-form + zod form so labels, descriptions, and errors auto-wire via aria-describedby across the product

components.name: HoverCard
components.useWhen: showing a hover-triggered preview card with rich content (use Tooltip for short hint text, Popover for click-triggered panels)

components.name: InlineEdit
components.useWhen: letting the user edit a single value (cost, store name, commission rate) without leaving the row — preferred over a modal for one-off changes

components.name: Input
components.useWhen: rendering a single-line text input that may need a leading or trailing slot, clear button, password reveal toggle, or async loading indicator

components.name: InputOTP
components.useWhen: rendering a one-time-password or verification-code field split into per-character slots

components.name: Kbd
components.useWhen: displaying a keyboard key or chord hint inline (use KbdGroup to compose multi-key shortcuts with consistent spacing)

components.name: KpiTile
components.useWhen: rendering a single headline metric with optional period-delta and context line (compose into a StatGroup row for primary KPI strip)

components.name: Label
components.useWhen: attaching an accessible text caption to a form control via htmlFor (placeholders are not labels)

components.name: MarketplaceLogo
components.useWhen: rendering a marketplace brand wordmark (Trendyol, Hepsiburada) with vendor-correct color preserved through unoptimized SVG delivery

components.name: Menubar
components.useWhen: building a document-style desktop top menu bar (rare in SaaS dashboards — prefer sidebar navigation + dropdown menus)

components.name: MoneyInput
components.useWhen: accepting a TRY monetary value as form input (use PercentageInput for %, Input type="number" for raw integers, Currency for read-only display)

components.name: NavGroup
components.useWhen: rendering a primary sidebar nav row that has children (sub-routes) and should both navigate and reveal the sub-list on click

components.name: NavigationMenu
components.useWhen: building a marketing-site top navigation with hover mega-menus (dashboard navigation belongs in the Sidebar primitive)

components.name: NotificationBell
components.useWhen: mounting a global notification surface in PageHeader.actions for high-frequency events (sync results, alerts) — full history lives at /notifications

components.name: OrgStoreSwitcher
components.useWhen: mounting the primary tenant context chip in the sidebar (combined org + store identity, ⌘O hotkey, sync-warning border, popover with full picker)

components.name: OrgStoreSwitcherList
components.useWhen: rendering the inner picker body for OrgStoreSwitcher (recent / all / stores sections, role badges, search, highlighting) — this is OrgStoreSwitcher's render delegate, not a standalone primitive

components.name: PageHeader
components.useWhen: anchoring a dashboard page with a title, optional context line, leading slot (breadcrumb / store chip), trailing actions, and meta row (typically SyncBadge)

components.name: Pagination
components.useWhen: rendering page-by-page navigation for a paginated list (use cursor-based "Load more" for infinite feeds, virtual scrolling for huge tables)

components.name: PercentageInput
components.useWhen: accepting a percentage as form input — commission rate, tax rate, margin, discount (use MoneyInput for currency; use Input type=number for raw integers)

components.name: Popover
components.useWhen: presenting a click-triggered anchored panel for a short interaction (use HoverCard for hover previews, Tooltip for hint text, Sheet for full panels)

components.name: Progress
components.useWhen: showing determinate 0-100 progress (use Spinner when the percentage is unknown)

components.name: RadioGroup
components.useWhen: rendering 2-7 mutually exclusive options that benefit from being all visible at once (use Select for longer lists)

components.name: RailWarningCard
components.useWhen: surfacing an actionable issue inline in the ContextRail (use Alert for page-width inline messages, future Banner for app-spanning system messages)

components.name: ScrollArea
components.useWhen: rendering a custom scrollbar for a constrained-height region inside an overlay or panel (not for the page body)

components.name: SearchInput
components.useWhen: rendering a search field with leading icon + onClear + standard placeholder (use Command for typeahead command palettes)

components.name: Select
components.useWhen: rendering a single-choice picker with a fixed list of options and no need for typeahead search

components.name: Separator
components.useWhen: drawing a thin horizontal or vertical line between sibling content groups that need a visible boundary beyond plain spacing

components.name: Sheet
components.useWhen: presenting detail or actions in a slide-over panel that preserves the underlying page context (use Dialog for focused tasks that need full attention)

components.name: Sidebar
components.useWhen: building primary dashboard navigation with collapsible icon-rail and mobile sheet fallback (use NavigationMenu for marketing-site top nav)

components.name: Skeleton
components.useWhen: showing a per-region loading placeholder shaped like the content it will replace (prefer over a spinner for first-load views with multiple async tiles)

components.name: Slider
components.useWhen: rendering a single or range numeric input over a continuous scale where relative position matters more than exact value

components.name: Spinner
components.useWhen: indicating in-flight async work inline within a small UI region (use Skeleton for page or region-level loading where the eventual layout matters)

components.name: StatGroup
components.useWhen: wrapping a row of KpiTile siblings that should self-tile responsively without breakpoint ladders

components.name: StatusDot
components.useWhen: marking inline status with just a colored dot (use Badge when the dot needs an inline label, SyncBadge for the canonical sync-state surface)

components.name: SubNavList
components.useWhen: rendering a vertical secondary navigation list in the ContextRail (use NavGroup children for sub-routes nested under a primary sidebar row)

components.name: Switch
components.useWhen: rendering an immediately-actioned on/off toggle (use Checkbox if the change should commit on form submit)

components.name: SyncBadge
components.useWhen: surfacing data freshness (last-synced-at + state) on a page where the data may be stale, with optional click-to-open SyncCenter

components.name: SyncCenter
components.useWhen: surfacing live sync progress and recent history in a right-side sheet, with cross-store grouping when the logs span 2+ stores (entry point is SyncBadge with onClick)

components.name: Table
components.useWhen: rendering a static HTML table with no sorting or filtering needs (use the DataTable pattern from components/patterns for anything dynamic)

components.name: Tabs
components.useWhen: switching between sibling content panels at the same hierarchy level (use Sidebar navigation when one panel is primary and others are auxiliary)

components.name: Textarea
components.useWhen: rendering a multi-line text input that may need a character counter or autoresize behavior

components.name: ThemeToggleInline
components.useWhen: rendering the dark/light theme toggle inside the sidebar bottom dock (CSS-only icon swap, SSR-safe by construction)

components.name: Toaster
components.useWhen: mounting the global toast container at the app root (call the exported toast() from feature code to fire a toast)

components.name: Toggle
components.useWhen: rendering a single press-and-hold two-state control (use Switch for settings, ToggleGroup for mutually exclusive picks)

components.name: ToggleGroup
components.useWhen: rendering a small set of related Toggles that should look unified and share a single-or-multiple selection rule

components.name: Tooltip
components.useWhen: surfacing short hint text on hover or focus (use HoverCard for rich preview content, never put critical info in a tooltip)

components.name: TrendDelta
components.useWhen: labelling a period-over-period percent change next to a value (always set goodDirection so direction reads correctly for cost vs revenue metrics)
